pm_analysis.title: PM Analysis & Project Scope
pm_analysis.sop: Analyze client request, define objective, identify deliverables, confirm project type and risk.

uiux_layout.title: UIUX Website Layout
uiux_layout.sop: Prepare responsive layout, page structure, design direction, component flow and user journey.

frontend_pages.title: Frontend Website Pages
frontend_pages.sop: Build responsive HTML/CSS/JS pages, reusable sections, navigation and mobile layout.

backend_auth_database.title: Backend Auth & Database
backend_auth_database.sop: Prepare Firebase Auth, Firestore collections, validation and access path.

backend_products_orders.title: Backend Product & Order System
backend_products_orders.sop: Prepare product database, cart/order structure, stock flow and admin order management.

seo_basic.title: Basic SEO Setup
seo_basic.sop: Prepare meta title, meta description, sitemap direction, heading structure and schema notes.

seo_product.title: Product SEO Setup
seo_product.sop: Prepare product schema, category keyword structure, ecommerce metadata and index rules.

qa_full.title: Full QA Review
qa_full.sop: Test responsive, links, forms, UI consistency, performance, SEO basics and final approval.

qa_ecommerce.title: Ecommerce QA Review
qa_ecommerce.sop: Test product flow, cart/order, checkout path, mobile shopping flow, database write and delivery readiness.

qa_dashboard.title: Dashboard QA Review
qa_dashboard.sop: Test auth, realtime data, cards, filters, responsive dashboard and error states.

inventory_delivery.title: Inventory & Delivery Logic
inventory_delivery.sop: Map physical/digital stock, delivery type, download/access delivery and order status.

content_brand.title: Brand Content Copy
content_brand.sop: Prepare brand story, service copy, CTA text, tone, tagline and section content.

marketing_launch.title: Marketing Launch Plan
marketing_launch.sop: Prepare launch angle, platform direction, offer message and simple campaign task.
